description: configureVault was implemented as curried (deps) => (input) => Result, but REQ-014 specifies the flat signature configureVault(deps, userSelectedPath): Result. Tests adapted to the curried form, so red-green stayed consistent, but the public spec signature did not match the public implementation. Resolved in-place by flattening to configureVault(deps, input) and updating all 50+ test call sites.

evidence.snippet: export function configureVault(deps: ConfigureVaultDeps, input: ConfigureVaultInput): Result<VaultDirectoryConfigured, VaultConfigError>

resolution.notes: Flattened configureVault to (deps, input) per REQ-014; updated all test call sites; 513/513 tests pass.
